description: Award an emoji reaction on a GitLab note (comment) for a merge request or issue (POST award_emoji on note). Use the note id from the notes API response.

resource.description: Whether the note belongs to a merge_request or issue thread.

iid.description: Merge request IID or issue IID.

note_id.description: Note id (field id on each note from GitLab notes API).

name.description: Award emoji name (GitLab key), e.g. thumbs_up, thumbs_down, smile, star, eyes, rocket, party_popper.
